title: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
summary: Syntetica, a French nylon recycling startup, has secured $30M in Series A funding backed by Lululemon and other notable investors. The company has developed novel approaches to nylon recycling, which is significant given the environmental impact of synthetic materials in the fashion industry. This demonstrates growing investment in sustainable manufacturing technologies.
content: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.

zh.title: Lululemon支持尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica完成3000万美元A轮融资
zh.summary: 法国尼龙回收初创公司Syntetica完成3000万美元A轮融资，由Lululemon和其他知名投资者支持。该公司开发了创新的尼龙回收方法，鉴于合成材料对时尚业的环保影响，这很重要。这表明投资者对可持续制造技术的关注持续增长。

title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
summary: Applied Computing has secured $20M in Series A funding to develop a foundation AI model tailored for the oil, gas, and petrochemical industries. This AI system aims to optimize operations across entire plants, potentially improving efficiency and decision-making in energy production. The investment highlights growing adoption of AI in traditionally capital-intensive industrial sectors.
content: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

zh.title: Applied Computing推出面向油气运营商的全厂AI模型
zh.summary: Applied Computing获得2000万美元A轮融资，用于开发专为石油、天然气和石化产业定制的基础AI模型。该AI系统旨在优化整个工厂的运营，有助于提高能源生产的效率和决策质量。这笔投资彰显了AI在传统资本密集型工业部门的应用日益增加。

title: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
summary: Venture firm Greylock intentionally capped its new fund at $1.5B despite capacity to raise more, maintaining about 25 investments per fund to position itself as a crucial strategic partner to founders.
content: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.

zh.title: 为什么Greylock将新基金限制在15亿美元，尽管表示可以筹集更多资金
zh.summary: 风险投资公司Greylock尽管有能力筹集更多资金，但仍故意将新基金限制在15亿美元，每只基金保持约25项投资，以将自己定位为创始人的关键战略合作伙伴。

title: Skullcandy’s bass-boosting Crusher headphones now come with Bose’s ANC
summary: Skullcandy released an updated Crusher wireless headphones version featuring Bose's QuietControl active noise cancellation and spatial audio for $279.99, addressing audio quality issues from excessive bass boosting.
content:
Skullcandy announced a new version of its Crusher wireless headphones today featuring a few of Bose's audio technologies including its QuietControl ANC and head-tracking spatial audio. The Crusher headphone line differentiates itself from the competition through the use of both full-range and dedicated bass drivers in each ear cup to boost deeper frequencies. Skullcandy admits that approach can result in a loss of audio quality when the bass is heavily boosted, but its new Crusher 1080 ANC are meant to address and improve that with Bose's help.
Available starting today for $279.99 in black, candy, primer, and cement color options, the new C …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Skullcandy的低音增强型Crusher耳机现在配备了Bose的主动降噪功能
zh.summary: Skullcandy推出了更新版本的Crusher无线耳机，搭载Bose的QuietControl主动降噪和空间音频，售价279.99美元，解决了过度低音增强造成的音质问题。
